mapper.insert: INSERT INTO API_ERROR_LOGS ( REQUEST_URI, HTTP_METHOD, CONTROLLER, USER_ID, WORKPLACE_ID, REQUEST_PARAMS, REQUEST_HEADERS, ERROR_MESSAGE, CLIENT_IP, USER_AGENT ) VALUES ( #{requestUri}, #{httpMethod}, #{controller}, #{userId}, #{workplaceId}, #{requestParams}, #{requestHeaders}, #{errorMessage}, #{clientIp}, #{userAgent} )
